text: Walking through this glass portal into the world of "R + D," I am aware of a peculiar mingling of anticipation and uncertainty. The curated environment speaks to curiosity and creative possibility. I feel part of an ongoing conversation about progress and innovation, my own thoughts echoing the theme of unfinished ideas and shifting potential. There is both clarity and ambiguity here, and a gentle optimism in the invitation to connect, reflect, and evolve. I am reminded that new beginnings are shaped in these liminal, imaginative spaces.
